org.kink_lang.kink.internal.vec.VecInternal

Package
Description
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.vec
Internal representation of vec vals.

  • Uses of VecInternal in org.kink_lang.kink.internal.vec

    Subclasses of VecInternal in org.kink_lang.kink.internal.vec
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    TraitVecInternal
    Immutable vec internal for elements like ['A' a 'B' b 'C' c].

    Method
    Description
    VecInternal
    VecInternal.append(Val val)
    Inserts a val to the end.
    VecInternal
    VecInternal.copy()
    Returns the new vec internal copying the whole elements of this vec internal.
    VecInternal
    VecInternal.copyRange(int from, int to)
    Returns a new vec internal copied from the range of this vec internal.
    VecInternal
    VecInternal.copyRangeWithCapa(int from, int to, int newCapa)
    Returns a new vec internal copied from the range of this vec internal.
    VecInternal

    abstract VecInternal
    VecInternal.insert(int index, Val val)
    Inserts a val to the position index.
    VecInternal

    abstract VecInternal
    VecInternal.insertAll(int index, VecInternal added)
    Inserts the elements of added to the position index.
    VecInternal

    abstract VecInternal
    VecInternal.insertRange(int index, Val[] src, int from, int to)
    Inserts the elements in the range of src to the position index.
    static VecInternal
    VecInternal.of(Vm vm, List<? extends Val> list)
    Returns a new vec internal containing the elements of the list.
    static VecInternal
    VecInternal.of(Vm vm, Val e0)
    Returns a new vec internal.
    static VecInternal
    VecInternal.of(Vm vm, Val[] array, int from, int to)
    Returns a new vec containing elements between from (inclusive) and to (exclusive) on the array.
    static VecInternal
    VecInternal.of(Vm vm, Val e0, Val e1)
    Returns a new vec internal.
    static VecInternal
    VecInternal.of(Vm vm, Val e0, Val e1, Val e2)
    Returns a new vec internal.
    static VecInternal
    VecInternal.of(Vm vm, Val e0, Val e1, Val e2, Val e3)
    Returns a new vec internal.
    static VecInternal
    VecInternal.ofCapa(Vm vm, int capa)
    Returns a new empty vec internal with the specified capa.
    VecInternal

    abstract VecInternal

    Removes the indexed element from the vec internal.
